category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Seychelles.

title.en: China-to-Seychelles EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入塞舌尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入塞席爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Seychelles SBS / SEC / PUC expectations, 240/415 V 50 Hz grid conditions, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, coastal salt-mist derating, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与塞舌尔SBS / SEC / PUC要求、240/415 V 50 Hz电网条件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据、沿海盐雾降额、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與塞席爾SBS / SEC / PUC要求、240/415 V 50 Hz電網條件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據、沿海鹽霧降額、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Seychelles, the practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector hardware, PUC project and grid-connection acceptance, and coastal salt-mist / humidity derating for island installations. Seychelles uses 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz: the frequency is the same as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. A GB/T-only charger using GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not physically or protocol compatible with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployments without hardware and firmware redesign.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入塞舌尔时，实务差距包括IEC体系安全和EMC证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口硬件、PUC项目及并网验收，以及适用于岛屿安装的沿海盐雾/湿热降额。塞舌尔电网为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。仅支持GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信的GB/T充电桩，若不进行硬件和固件重新设计，不能与IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署实现物理或协议兼容。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入塞席爾時，實務差距包括IEC體系安全和EMC證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口硬體、PUC項目及併網驗收，以及適用於島嶼安裝的沿海鹽霧/濕熱降額。塞席爾電網為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。僅支持GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊的GB/T充電樁，若不進行硬體和固件重新設計，不能與IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署實現物理或協議兼容。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SBS standards ruling, SEC regulatory approval, PUC connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Seychelles conformity assessment rules, PUC project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SBS标准裁定、SEC监管批准、PUC接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行塞舌尔合格评定规则、PUC项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SBS標準裁定、SEC監管批准、PUC接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞席爾合格評定規則、PUC項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
